summary: Backend testing for System Audit feature - All 12 tests passed. Login/logout audit logging, system-audit endpoint, shift audit logging, and view_audit_complete permission all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Central audit logging function (log_audit_event) is well-implemented with proper async handling
Login/logout audit logging correctly integrated in auth.py
Shift open/close audit logging correctly integrated in server.py
view_audit_complete permission properly defined for admin (level 100) and supervisor roles
System audit report endpoint consolidates data from multiple sources including system_audit_logs collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: System Audit feature fully tested. Central audit logging (utils/audit.py) is working. Login/logout events are being logged to system_audit_logs collection. The /api/reports/system-audit endpoint returns consolidated audit data including LOGIN, LOGOUT, SHIFT_OPENED events. The view_audit_complete permission is correctly assigned to admin and supervisor roles.

test_cases: test_system_audit_includes_login_events - PASSED (32 LOGIN events with correct structure)
test_view_audit_complete_in_all_permissions - PASSED (Label: Ver Auditoría Completa del Sistema)
